nasb.text: Then King Hezekiah arose early and assembled the princes of the city and went up to the house of the Lord.

esv.text: Then Hezekiah the king rose early and gathered the officials of the city and went up to the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 希西家王清早起來，召集城中的領袖，上耶和華的殿去。

ccb.text: 希西迦王清早起来，召集城中官员一同上到耶和华的殿。
